name: node-find-up

summary: Find a file by walking up parent directories
description:
Find a file by walking up parent directories
find-up helps in finding a file or directory by walking up parent directories.
There are related tools, too. CLI for this module is find-up-cli.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-find-up with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-find-up --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
